channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Various Waste dumped here, 23rd May
item.description:
Looks to be a mix of general and construction, Can council attend and remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walters Yard, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallet dumped here, 23rd May
item.description:
Can council attend and remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walters Yard, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Dumped Waitrose Trolley here, 23rd May
item.description:
Waitrose atrolley dumped here can council attend and remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walters Yard, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Animal is struggling, 23rd May
item.description:
Auntie has told her that there is a Pigeon that is currently injured and cant fly. The Pigeon is in the alleyway between 73 and 75.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes on Whimbrel Close, 23rd May
item.description:
I reported over a year ago and the potholes are getting worse and more appearing. Needs the whole road to be fixed and resurfaced

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whimbrel Close, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two shopping trolleys on pavement, 23rd May
item.description:
Two trolleys, including one Homebase one, by the railway arch. Partly blocking pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: End of cul de sac, 23rd May
item.description:
Lots of rubbish including bikes and washing machines
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Fly tip by the house on the corner of bevan road/rochdale road, 23rd May
item.description:
The house on the corner of Rochdale/bevan road with the black car seem to think it’s ok to use the bins for the flats to fly tip there rubbish. Council informed and evidence is gathering. This time is loads of fence panels while they jet wash the back garden. STOP DUMPING OR RISK A FINE

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bevan Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge on the pavement, 23rd May
item.description:
It's been there a couple of days so I don't think it's out for an organised collection

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox, 23rd May
item.description:
FixMyStreet ref 9495675. I have wrapped the young fox cub in a towel and put it on the grass at the side of the underpass.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car blocking the pavements for years, 23rd May
item.description:
Hi guys , can someone have a word , mostly the shop owners double parking , been going on for years . Seems parking folk turn a blind eye .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydenham Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping again, 23rd May
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Batley Place, Hackney, London
